user.title: ABB Welcome
user.description:
Pair this Home Assistant instance with your ABB Welcome IP gateway.

Four fields:
• MyBuildings portal username and password (same as the official ABB Welcome mobile app).
• Gateway local IP address.
• Gateway web admin password (the one used at https://<gateway-ip>/).

After you submit, the integration finishes pairing automatically — no need to open the gateway web admin yourself.

confirm.title: Confirm Setup
confirm.description:
Pairing complete.

SIP user: `{sip_username}@{sip_domain}`
Doors discovered ({door_count}):

{door_names}

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the gateway on port 5060. Check the IP and that you are on the same network.
error.gateway_not_found: No IP gateway is visible to this portal account.
error.gateway_admin_auth_failed: Gateway admin password is wrong (login at https://<gateway-ip>/ as `admin` failed).
error.no_pending_app: The gateway did not see our pairing request. Try again or check that the portal account is linked to this gateway.
error.integrity_code_rejected: The gateway rejected the integrity code we computed. Open an issue with your gateway firmware version.
error.gateway_admin_failed: Talking to the gateway admin CGI failed — see the Home Assistant log.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see the Home Assistant log.

abort.acl_timeout: The gateway did not push a configuration after pairing. Try again.
abort.acl_parse_failed: The gateway sent a configuration but it could not be parsed. Check the Home Assistant log.
abort.unknown: Unexpected error during ACL polling — see the Home Assistant log.

init.title: ABB Welcome options
init.description: How should this integration unlock doors?

options.hybrid: Hybrid (fast for first door, standard for others) — recommended
options.fast: Fast (always plain MESSAGE) — lowest latency, may not work everywhere
